title: 2pcs Laundry Shoe Bag, Shoe Washing Machine Bag with Hidden Zipper Cleaning Fluff Can Deep Cleaning, Reusable without Distortion Shoe Laundry Bag for Sneakers Football Running Shoes, Blue
features: 【Fluffy Fibers Keep 360° Wrap-around Cleaning 】Teletrogy innovative shoe washing machine bag is designed with over 20,000 chenille microfibers, allowing for a deep and gentle cleaning of your shoes in the washer. Unlike mesh shoe wash bags, the plush and fluffy texture of these fibers effectively removes stains from the surface of your shoes, providing a thorough cleaning experience. You could enjoy the benefits of the white fluffy fibers without worrying about lint or dye transferring onto your white shoes.

【Efficient Cleaning without Damaging Shoes】Sneaker laundry shoes bags are made of tear-resistant and highly permeable chenille fabric material, allowing soap and water to easily flow through while keeping your shoes protected during the entire washing cycle. Our shoe laundry bag makes cleaning your shoes easier than ever before.

【Hidden Zipper Design】Teletrogy shoe washing machine bag is equipped with durable hidden zippers that ensure a secure closure. The tight and smooth zipper teeth seal shut to prevent shoes from falling out during cleaning. The side elastic protective cover also safeguards the inner barrel of the washing machine from scratches caused by the zipper. Side zip design, you can put in and take out shoes easily. And the larger opening can put in plush dolls for cleaning, easy to solve the cleaning burden, enjoy a simple life.

【Capacity Upgrade】The size is 7*15in. With the shoe washing machine bag, you no longer have to spend time scrub your shoes by hand. You can easily wash one pair of men's sneakers or two pairs of women's sneakers or three pairs of children's shoes at once. Warm tips: For adult shoes, we recommend putting a shoe in a laundry bag for better cleaning.

【Multipurposed Shoe Washing Bags】Teletrogy shoe washing bag is made from durable material that can withstand repeated washing cycles, making it perfect for protecting your shoes in the washer. Teletrogy shoe laundry bag can also double as a travel shoe bag to keep your shoes separate and clean while on the go. This portable and practical sneaker laundry bag can also be used to store clothes, laundry accessories, and more, making it a versatile solution for keeping your items organized and fresh.
